EXT. EIFFEL TOWER BASE - DAY I24
The Symbol of France rises above the city. We see Cla~k's P.o.v.

TWO CUTE FRENCH GIRLS are nearby. They are with a fat, vicious

A big, raucous nightclub along the lines of a Follies or
